title: Static Site Build Orchestration
interaction_flow: build() → generateSubPages(ROOT_DIR): generate skills/antipatterns/tutorials HTML sub-pages → returns { files: subPageFiles }

build() → buildStaticSite(subPageFiles): calls Bun.build({ entrypoints: [index.html, cheatsheet.html, privacy.html, ...subPageFiles], outdir: 'build/', minify: true }) → flattens nested build/public/* to build/*
build() → fs: copy static assets (og-image.jpg, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, favicon.svg, apple-touch-icon.png) from public/ to build/
build() → copyDirSync: copy public/antipattern-examples → build/antipattern-examples
build() → fs.copyFileSync: copy src/detect-antipatterns-browser.js → build/js/detect-antipatterns-browser.js
build() → readSourceFiles(ROOT_DIR): returns { skills[] } (each with filePath, name, description, userInvocable)
build() → readPatterns(ROOT_DIR): returns { patterns[], antipatterns[] }
build() → fs.readFileSync('.claude-plugin/plugin.json'): reads skillsVersion

build() → [for each PROVIDER] createTransformer(config): returns transform fn → transform(skills, DIST_DIR, { skillsVersion }) [unprefixed] + transform(skills, DIST_DIR, { prefix: 'i-', outputSuffix: '-prefixed', skillsVersion }) [prefixed]
build() → assembleUniversal(DIST_DIR): merges all provider configDirs into dist/universal/, writes README.txt
build() → assembleUniversal(DIST_DIR, '-prefixed'): same for prefixed variant → dist/universal-prefixed/
build() → createAllZips(DIST_DIR): creates ZIP bundles for individual providers + universal
build() → generateApiData(buildDir, skills, patterns): writes build/_data/api/{skills,commands,patterns}.json + command-source/{id}.json per skill
build() → copyDistToBuild(DIST_DIR, buildDir): copies dist/ → build/_data/dist/ for CF Pages Functions
build() → generateCFConfig(buildDir): writes build/_headers (security + cache rules), build/_redirects (API rewrites + /gallery redirect), build/_routes.json (CF Functions include /api/download/*)
build() → [for each PROVIDER] copyDirSync: sync dist/{provider}/{configDir}/skills → {ROOT}/{configDir}/skills (local harness)
build() → [for each PROVIDER] fs.rmSync: delete deprecated local skill stubs (frontend-design, teach-impeccable, arrange, normalize, onboard, extract)

build() → generateCounts(ROOT_DIR, skills, buildDir): counts active commands + detection rules from detect-antipatterns.mjs, writes public/js/generated/counts.js, validates stale refs in HTML/MD/JSON files
build() → validateAntipatternRules(ROOT_DIR): cross-validates each ANTIPATTERNS rule's skillGuideline against DON'T text in source/skills/impeccable/SKILL.md via readPatterns()
build() → validateSiteHeader(ROOT_DIR): checks index.html, cheatsheet.html, privacy.html for '<!-- site-header v1 -->' marker
build() → validateNoEmDashes(ROOT_DIR): scans content/site, public HTML, scripts for em dash characters (—, —, —, —)
build() → process.exit(1): if any of countErrors | validationErrors | headerErrors | emDashErrors > 0
key_relationships: build() depends_on generateSubPages (build-sub-pages.js) — must complete before buildStaticSite
buildStaticSite depends_on Bun runtime (Bun.build API) with HTML bundler
validateAntipatternRules depends_on readPatterns (lib/utils.js) — reads ANTIPATTERNS array + SKILL.md sections
assembleUniversal depends_on createTransformer outputs (all PROVIDERS must be transformed first)
createAllZips depends_on assembleUniversal (universal dir must exist)
copyDistToBuild depends_on all transform + zip steps (dist/ fully populated)
generateCFConfig produces _headers + _redirects + _routes.json independently (no prior data needed)

function_signatures.assembleUniversal: function assembleUniversal(distDir: string, suffix?: string): void
function_signatures.generateApiData: function generateApiData(buildDir: string, skills: Skill[], patterns: PatternData): void
function_signatures.copyDistToBuild: function copyDistToBuild(distDir: string, buildDir: string): void
function_signatures.generateCounts: function generateCounts(rootDir: string, skills: Skill[], buildDir: string): number
function_signatures.copyDirSync: function copyDirSync(src: string, dest: string): void

important_notes: Entry point: build() at bottom of file via build() call — runs with Bun (#!/usr/bin/env node but uses Bun APIs)
DIST_DIR = ROOT_DIR/dist (provider-specific ZIPs + dirs), BUILD_DIR = ROOT_DIR/build (static site output for CF Pages)
generateSubPages must run BEFORE buildStaticSite — sub-page HTML files are passed as extra Bun entrypoints
Bun.build naming: entry=[dir]/[name].[ext], chunk=[dir]/[name]-[hash].[ext] — guards against CF Pages Bun deduplication bug
After Bun build: flattens build/public/* → build/* if nested public/ dir appears in output
PROVIDERS from lib/transformers/index.js — each has { provider, configDir }; transformed twice: normal + 'i-' prefixed
generateCounts writes to public/js/generated/counts.js (COMMAND_COUNT + DETECTION_COUNT exports)
generateCFConfig _redirects: /api/* routes rewrite to build/_data/api/*.json (serverless-free static API)
Build fails with process.exit(1) if any validation step returns errors > 0
